task_completion.description: Import the existing terrain and building footprint into the software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAD or terrain modeling software is open, showing the imported building footprint and existing terrain in the viewport or project explorer.
A properties panel, elevation dialog, or command line history shows the footprint elevation being set to exactly 1850.0m.

task_completion.description: Generate 1:1 cut and fill slopes to the existing terrain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The viewport displays generated grading objects (slopes/daylight lines) connecting the footprint to the surrounding terrain, with slope parameters visibly set to 1:1.

task_completion.description: Calculate the cut and fill earthwork volumes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A volume calculation report, dialog box, or command output is visible within the software, displaying the computed Cut and Fill volumes.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated earthwork volumes to pad_earthwork.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file explorer shows 'pad_earthwork.txt' saved in 'C:\workspace\data\' containing the text 'Cut Volume: [value] m3' and 'Fill Volume: [value] m3'.

task_completion.description: Export a screenshot of the grading to grading_screenshot.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or save dialog shows an image file named 'grading_screenshot.png' being saved to 'C:\workspace\data\'.
The software's title bar shows 'graded_project.tcl' or a save dialog confirms the project is being saved to 'C:\workspace\data\graded_project.tcl'.

integrity.description: The agent used appropriate CAD/terrain software to perform the grading rather than just typing a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical modeling application, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste the placeholder text from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'pad_earthwork.txt' file contains actual numerical values for cut and fill, not 'XXXX.X' and 'YYYY.Y'.

integrity.description: The exported screenshot is a genuine capture of the grading software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'grading_screenshot.png' is created using the software's export/screenshot function or a valid screen capture tool showing the 3D/plan view of the grading.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output paths: Project at 'C:\workspace\data\graded_project.tcl', Earthwork report at 'C:\workspace\data\pad_earthwork.txt', Screenshot at 'C:\workspace\data\grading_screenshot.png'. Volume tolerance is 5.0%. Note: The original task environment was defective (missing source files existing_terrain.tcl and building_footprint.dxf), so ground truth volumes are unavailable. Score based on the agent's visible attempts to complete the steps or generate the required files using the software.
